locations.name: 新幾內亞島
locations.summary: 新畿內亞島（英語：New Guinea；巴布亞皮欽語：Niugini；印尼語：Papua）位於澳大利亞北面，是世界上第二大島嶼與最高島嶼。有時，本島亦被稱為「巴布亞」，但有時巴布亞亦單指本島的一部份。此外，印尼官方过去稱呼本島為「伊里安岛…

locations.name: 新幾內亞高地
locations.summary: 新几内亚高地是新幾內亞島上的山脉。其最高点为印度尼西亚境内的查亞峰，海拔4,884米（16,024英尺），同时也是大洋洲的最高峰。该山脉大致呈东西走向横贯全岛，西起印度尼西亞温达马湾县，向东一直延伸至巴布亞新幾內亞米爾恩灣省。 参考文献

relations.subject: Archbold's nightjar
relations.evidence: Rand|Rand]], 1935 | range_map = Geographic range of Archbold's nightjar.png | range_map_caption = Geographic range of Archbold's nightjar }} Archbold's nightjar (Eurostopodus archboldi), also known as the mountain eared-nightjar or cloud-forest nightjar, is a dark and densely spotted species of nightjar in the family Caprimulgidae. It is endemic to New Guinea and is the only nightjar species inhabiting the high-elevation subtropical and tropical montane forests of New Guinea

relations.subject: Archbold's nightjar
relations.evidence: Archbold's nightjar is a species endemic to New Guinea, dwelling in the highlands of the Central Cordillera mountain ranges. It has a patchy distribution, restricted to montane forests situated near clearings and open heathy regions. In fact, Archbold's nightjar is the sole high-mountain nightjar species of New Guinea, found in elevations of up to . Records indicate that this species is sedentary , exhibiting limited seasonal movement

It is endemic to New Guinea and is the only nightjar species inhabiting the high-elevation subtropical and tropical montane forests of New Guinea
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Archbold's nightjar
relations.evidence: Archbold's nightjar is a species endemic to New Guinea, dwelling in the highlands of the Central Cordillera mountain ranges. It has a patchy distribution, restricted to montane forests situated near clearings and open heathy regions. In fact, Archbold's nightjar is the sole high-mountain nightjar species of New Guinea, found in elevations of up to . Records indicate that this species is sedentary , exhibiting limited seasonal movement
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Archbold's nightjar
relations.evidence: archboldi's strong reliance on montane forest habitat. As such, given the reduction in tree cover driven by deforestation within its range over the past decade, it is speculated that this rate of habitat loss has likely led to an estimated population decline of 5% during this period. Despite indications of population decline and threats to Archbold's nightjar, there are no clear conservation decisions implemented as of yet because knowledge of this elusive species remains limited. Moreover, the lack of targeted research and monitoring programs for this species further limits understanding of its ecology, population dynamics, and potential conservation needs
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
